sprites.prompt: Tiny simple 16-bit pixel art character sprite, top-down RPG style similar to Pokémon Ruby/Sapphire overworld sprites. Extremely small and simple, only 24x32 pixels, minimal detail, 4-5 colors maximum per character, on a transparent background. Young man, brown hair, blue jacket, khaki pants.
